blended.narrative: Mont Sutton is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 8,636 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

Thursday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
